remaining_mean_after_removal: If labels {removed_labels_text} were removed, what would be the mean of the remaining labels?
Remove labels {removed_labels_text}. What is the average value of the labels that remain?
After excluding {removed_labels_text}, compute the mean of the remaining values.
Ignoring labels {removed_labels_text}, what is the average of the remaining labeled values?
What is the mean after removing labels {removed_labels_text} from the display?
target_share_after_removal: If labels {removed_labels_text} were removed, what percent of the remaining total is label "{target_label}"?
Remove labels {removed_labels_text}. What integer percent of the remaining sum comes from label "{target_label}"?
After excluding {removed_labels_text}, compute the share of label "{target_label}" in the remaining total as a percent.
Ignoring labels {removed_labels_text}, what percent of the remaining total is contributed by "{target_label}"?
What is the integer percent share of label "{target_label}" after removing {removed_labels_text}?

global.json_output_contract: Use a valid JSON object with keys "annotation" and "answer" in that order for the final answer.
global.json_output_contract_answer_only: Use a valid JSON object with key "answer" for the final answer.

query:remaining_mean_after_removal.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value; for percentage questions, omit the percent sign
query:remaining_mean_after_removal.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on the chart marks whose values remain in the average after the stated removals

query:target_share_after_removal.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer value; for percentage questions, omit the percent sign
query:target_share_after_removal.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x,y] pixel points on the chart marks whose values remain in the total after the stated removals
